ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the species belongs to */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genus the species belongs to */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species for easier identification */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "genetic_diversity" TEXT /* Information about genetic diversity and health of the species */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Major threats to the species (e.g., habitat loss, poaching) */,
  "conservation_actions" TEXT /* Current conservation actions being taken for the species */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated current population size */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "last_population_survey" TEXT /* Date of the last population survey */,
  "conservation_status" INTEGER /* Conservation status (e.g., CR, DD) */,
  "population_trend" INTEGER /* Population trend (e.g., Decreasing, Unknown) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the species record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_status FOREIGN KEY ("conservation_status") REFERENCES conservation_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_population_trend FOREIGN KEY ("population_trend") REFERENCES population_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the family */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Order to which the family belongs */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "endangered_species_count" INTEGER /* Number of endangered species in the family */,
  "geographic_range" TEXT /* Geographic range of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the family record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the genus belongs to */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "endangered_species_count" INTEGER /* Number of endangered species in the genus */,
  "geographic_range" TEXT /* Geographic range of the genus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the genus record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status (e.g., CR, DD) */,
  "iucn_criteria" TEXT /* IUCN criteria used to determine the conservation status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the population trend (e.g., Decreasing, Unknown) */,
  "iucn_criteria" TEXT /* IUCN criteria used to determine the population trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the trend was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type (e.g., Forest, Grassland) */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Major threats to the habitat */,
  "conservation_actions" TEXT /* Current conservation actions being taken for the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the habitat record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_habitats" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species-habitat relationship */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the habitat */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "habitat_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the habitat to the species (e.g., critical, important) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_habitats_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_habitats_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observation */,
  "observer" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population size at the time of observation */,
  "habitat_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the habitat at the time of observation (e.g., good, degraded) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "project_partner" TEXT /* Name of the project partner (e.g., NGO, government agency) */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  "project_risks" TEXT /* Potential risks and challenges of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_species" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-species relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "species_role" TEXT /* Role of the species in the project (e.g., target, beneficiary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES conservation_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the species record */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the species record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Name of the funding source (e.g., NGO, Government) */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, donation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_sources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES conservation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the milestone */,
  "milestone_risks" TEXT /* Potential risks and challenges of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for the milestone */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES conservation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "iucn_id" INTEGER /* Identifier from the IUCN Red List for integration with external data */,
  "outcome_measurements" TEXT /* Specific measurements or metrics used to evaluate the outcome */,
  "outcome_impact" TEXT /* Detailed impact of the outcome */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the outcome (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES conservation_projects ("project_id")
)
